'''marupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nga|nga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nga|nga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| marupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæripith|mæripith]] || [[word:mæripij|mæripij]] || [[word:mæripish|mæripish]] || [[word:mæripi|mæripi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maruruputh|maruruputh]] || [[word:marurupuj|marurupuj]] || [[word:marurupush|marurupush]] || [[word:marurupu|marurupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maruputh|maruputh]] || [[word:marupuj|marupuj]] || [[word:marupush|marupush]] || [[word:marupu|marupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:marufputh|marufputh]] || [[word:marufpuj|marufpuj]] || [[word:marufpush|marufpush]] || [[word:marufpuf|marufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maruputhu|maruputhu]] || [[word:marupuju|marupuju]] || [[word:marupushu|marupushu]] || [[word:marupuku|marupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maruputh|maruputh]] || [[word:marupuj|marupuj]] || [[word:marupush|marupush]] || [[word:marupu|marupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maruputhul|maruputhul]] || [[word:marupujul|marupujul]] || [[word:marupushul|marupushul]] || [[word:marupukul|marupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maruputhuthu|maruputhuthu]] || [[word:marupujuju|marupujuju]] || [[word:marupushushu|marupushushu]] || [[word:marupuku|marupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maruputhun|maruputhun]] || [[word:marupujun|marupujun]] || [[word:marupushun|marupushun]] || [[word:marupukun|marupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maruputhuoro|maruputhuoro]] || [[word:marupujuoro|marupujuoro]] || [[word:marupushuoro|marupushuoro]] || [[word:marupukuoro|marupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
